parameters.query:
SELECT page_url, page_title, target_keyword
FROM client_pages
WHERE project_name = '{{ $json.projectName }}'
  AND page_url != '{{ $json.pageUrl }}'
ORDER BY published_date DESC
LIMIT 50;

UPDATE client_pages
SET internal_links_out = COALESCE(internal_links_out, '[]'::jsonb) || '{{ JSON.stringify($json.linkFromNewPage) }}'::jsonb
WHERE project_name = '{{ $json.projectName }}' AND page_url = '{{ $json.pageUrl }}';

INSERT INTO client_pages (project_name, page_url, internal_links_in)
SELECT '{{ $json.projectName }}', unnest_link->>'page_url',
  jsonb_build_array(jsonb_build_object('url', '{{ $json.pageUrl }}', 'anchor', unnest_link->>'suggested_anchor_text'))
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.linkToNewPage) }}'::jsonb) AS unnest_link
ON CONFLICT (project_name, page_url) DO NOTHING;
